43990.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
43990.description: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

43991.title: CNN Town Hall
43991.description: President Joe Biden participates in a CNN town hall in Cincinnati, Ohio. CNN anchor Don Lemon moderates the live event focusing on a wide range of issues facing the nation ranging from Covid-19 to the economy.

43992.title: Anderson Cooper 360
43992.description: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

43993.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
43993.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home, Tuscany, with a wine bar crawl, celebrating the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

43994.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
43994.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

43995.title: World Sport
43995.description: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

43996.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
43996.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

43997.title: World Sport
43997.description: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

43998.title: CNN Newsroom with Rosemary Church
43998.description: Live from Atlanta, Rosemary Church brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

43999.title: CNN Newsroom with Isa Soares
43999.description: Live from London, Isa Soares brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

44000.title: Early Start
44000.description: Get a jump on the day's news with Christine Romans and Laura Jarrett.

44001.title: New Day
44001.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

44002.title: World Sport
44002.description: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

44003.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
44003.description: Get a head start on what's moving the business agenda with Julia Chatterley live from the floor of the New York Stock Exchange.

44004.title: Connect the World
44004.description: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

44005.title: World Sport
44005.description: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

44006.title: Connect the World
44006.description: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

44007.title: One World with Zain Asher
44007.description: One World with Zain Asher offers a fresh and inclusive take on the top stories from Africa, Europe and beyond, giving every continent an equal voice.

44008.title: Inside Africa
44008.description: From superbikes to racecars, some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels provide an inside look at what life is like on, and off, the track.

44009.title: Amanpour
44009.description: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

44010.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
44010.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

44011.title: Quest Means Business
44011.description: Richard Quest presides over a cast of experts and correspondents to deliver unrivaled facts, figures and analysis from the business world, a nightly wealth check.

44012.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
44012.description: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.

50600.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
50600.description: Wolf Blitzer is in the command center for breaking news, politics and extraordinary reports from around the world.
